rules: Use set -eo pipefail (not -u) to avoid silent unbound variable failures
Exit 0 on non-critical errors (NFR-7: advisory hooks must never block unexpectedly)
Use ${BASH_SOURCE[0]:-$0} for script path resolution (run.cjs executes via bash)
Follow existing test naming conventions (describe/it blocks matching src file structure)
Include both positive and negative test cases for each function
Do not introduce external test dependencies beyond the existing test framework
No external npm dependencies — use Node.js built-in modules only (NFR-4)
Export functions individually; avoid default exports for testability
Handle all file I/O errors gracefully with try/catch and silent fallback
Include memory field in frontmatter (memory: project or memory: user)
Specify maxTurns and permissionMode in frontmatter
Prefix agent identity line with agent emoji and [AgentName] format
SKILL.md frontmatter must be raw YAML at file top (no code block wrapper)
Register new skill name in src/cross-refs.js KNOWN_SKILLS array
Skill description must be ≤120 characters for marketplace display
